title: Kaya’s Mansion Draws the Crew In
description: On pages 14–17, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's best if you don't try to attack this village,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because my 80 million men are not going to forgive you!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You're lying right?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Bull's eye!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: WAA! I've been caught!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: See, you even said it your- self!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ARGHA!! Did I just say that?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Bad Planning! Bad Planning indeed!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hahahaha! You're so funny!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't undergo- timate me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I am a man with high self- esteem!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: and every- one calls me the "honorable usopp"!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A small tavern in the village

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What? Looking for com- panions?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So, you're looking for companions and a big ship?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yup!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh! Sounds like a big adventure!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's only one place where you can find the stuff you want in this village...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Although it's not a very big ship, but it's not that small either

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's a mansion not far from this village that belongs to a wealthy family

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The ship belongs to the man- lion's owner

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Although we say that she is the owner...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: She is a pitiful young girl...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: A weak and sick girl that always lies on the bed...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then how come she's the owner of the mansion?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: OBASAN!! Another plate of meat!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I want some more sake...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are you listening to me!!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think it hap- pened around a year ago..

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That girl's parents died of sickness,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: leaving her a large inheritance, a mansion, and over ten ser- vants...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even if you are really rich,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It doesn't exempt you from sorrow

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
